title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model management and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & asynchronous APIs and Kotlin coroutines support.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot plugin that uses a local Ollama model instead of OpenAI for code completions.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama answers into any channel; supports slash commands and custom system prompts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that brings Ollama models into your workspace via socket-mode and supports threaded conversations.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama for embeddings & generation and Chroma for vector storage.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside the editor, generate code or refactor selections.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit component that wraps Ollama chat with session memory, markdown rendering and voice input.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat & embed endpoints so any MCP client can call them.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Utility to convert and upload Hugging Face models into the Ollama Modelfile format with one command.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with 30+ recipes: function-calling, vision, voice, RAG, agents, fine-tuning and more.
